title: Samurai Duel on Dark Lake
description: A complex multi-scene video prompt for an epic samurai duel on a dark lake, featuring detailed character introductions, engagement, and a powerful collision effect.
promptText:
Two elite swordsmen face each other on a vast dark lake under storm clouds. The lake surface is calm like black glass, reflecting faint moonlight.

IMPORTANT: Each character performs individually before any combat begins.

SCENE 1 (0–4s): Introduction Performance — Sakura Warrior
The female Sakura swordswoman (Image1) stands gracefully on a floating wooden platform. She slowly steps forward, showing calm mastery. She performs a controlled sword demonstration: slow elegant katana movements in the air, precise and fluid, with sakura petals forming around her blade. The camera focuses on her elegance, balance, and breathing control. No opponent interaction yet.

SCENE 2 (4–8s): Introduction Performance — Three-Blade Warrior
The male Three-Blade swordsman (Image2) stands on a separate floating platform across the lake. He performs his own combat demonstration: controlled dual stance transitions, shifting weight, and rapid footwork visualization without advancing. His swords are revealed one by one in a disciplined sequence. Green wind energy subtly flows around his movements. Camera focuses on strength, discipline, and precision.

SCENE 3 (8–12s): Mutual Awareness
Both characters stop their demonstrations and lock eyes across the lake. The atmosphere becomes tense. Wind intensifies. Water begins to ripple between them. Camera slowly zooms out to reveal distance and scale of the battlefield.

SCENE 4 (12–16s): Water Run Engagement
Both warriors simultaneously step onto the water surface, running across it with controlled speed. Each character creates independent ripples and splash trails. No shared motion path. Camera tracking shot follows their separate trajectories as they close distance.

SCENE 5 (16–20s): First Clash
They meet mid-air above the lake. A powerful collision of sakura-pink energy and green wind force explodes outward, distorting the water surface below like shattered glass. Camera performs slow 360 orbit around impact point.

SCENE 6 (20–24s): Aftermath
Both land on opposite sides of the lake, standing still. Mist slowly rises. The lake returns to silence. Final slow pull-back reveals the vast dark battlefield.

Lighting: cinematic moonlight, volumetric fog, storm atmosphere, high contrast reflections.  
Style: cinematic wuxia realism, grounded physics, epic samurai duel tone.  
Audio: wind pressure, katana movement, water footsteps, distant thunder, impact shockwave.

4K Ultra HD, rich details, sharp clarity, cinematic texture, stable picture. Maintain face and clothing consistency, no distortion, high detail. Generate video without subtitles.

title: Anime Storyboard and Character Design
description: A detailed production board for an emotional anime short film titled 'The Girl and the Lighthouse', featuring character designs and cinematic storyboards.
promptText:
- Create a single vertical anime animation development board for an original emotional short film titled "The Girl and the Lighthouse". The output must be ONE combined image containing an anime character design sheet and a cinematic storyboard page.

IMPORTANT:
→ Create fully original anime characters
→ Do not imitate any existing anime studio style directly
→ Do not resemble any copyrighted anime characters
→ Keep designs unique, soft, nostalgic, and emotionally warm

STYLE:
→ Premium anime pre-production board
→ Mix loose hand-drawn storyboard sketches with semi-rendered anime keyframes
→ Use soft watercolor-style lighting, cool sea blue and warm lighthouse gold colors, gentle shadows, red storyboard borders, blue motion arrows, handwritten production notes, timing notes, and lens notes

LAYOUT:
Clean vertical composition with 2 sections.

SECTION A — CHARACTER DESIGN SHEET

Girl:
→ A gentle anime girl with long windswept dark hair, soft blue-grey eyes, and a quietly waiting expression
→ She wears: a soft cream knit sweater, a faded blue skirt, worn white canvas shoes, and a small green scarf
→ She should feel: patient, quietly hopeful, emotionally deep, nostalgically waiting
→ Show: front view, side profile, back view, 3/4 angle
→ Expressions: patient, soft smile, quietly hopeful, calm and waiting
→ Pose standing at the cliff edge watching the lighthouse
→ Pose sitting on cliff rocks with knees drawn up
→ Pose holding her scarf as the sea wind blows

Lighthouse:
→ An old weathered lighthouse on a rocky seaside cliff — tall, worn stone, warm rotating golden light at the top
→ It should feel: steady, faithful, warm, a symbol of patient waiting and guidance
→ Show: wide view from cliff, close-up of rotating light, reflection on sea water

Add tiny handwritten notes and soft pastel anime color swatches.

SECTION B — STORYBOARD
Create 8 cinematic anime storyboard panels in a neat grid. Each panel should include handwritten camera notes, blue motion arrows, timing notes, and lens notes.

Story Beats:
→ Wide shot of an old anime seaside village at dusk — calm sea, rocky cliffs, warm lighthouse light beginning to glow
→ The girl walks alone along the cliff path toward the lighthouse as the sun sets
→ She sits down on the cliff rocks and looks out at the sea, quiet and waiting
→ Close-up of her face — patient, softly hopeful, emotionally still
→ The lighthouse light begins its slow rotation, sending warm golden light across the sea
→ She watches the light sweep across the water — each rotation steady and faithful
→ Wide shot — girl on the cliff, lighthouse above, the vast calm sea below, warm dusk light
→ Emotional ending — the lighthouse light sweeps across her face one more time, warm and gentle, the whole sea glowing behind her

Environment:
Old anime seaside village at dusk. Rocky cliffs, calm sea, old stone lighthouse. Warm golden dusk light on the water. Sea wind, distant waves, peaceful nostalgic coastal atmosphere.

title: 3D Octopus Master Chef
description: A Pixar-style animated video prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a purple octopus chef in a high-energy underwater kitchen.
promptText:
Style Directives: 3D animated cartoon, Pixar/Illumination style, hyper-vibrant colors, exaggerated squash-and-stretch physics, dynamic camera movements, high-contrast volumetric lighting, motion blur on fast actions. 

[0:00 - 0:03] The Setup Camera starts on an extreme, fast-paced dolly-in. We are inside a bustling, neon-lit underwater kitchen made of coral. A frantic, bright purple Octopus Chef wearing a towering white toque is cooking at warp speed. Four tentacles are chopping glowing neon-green kelp into a blur, two tentacles are tossing a giant, glowing jellyfish-dough into the air, and one is furiously whisking a bowl of bioluminescent blue soup.
[0:03 - 0:06] The Catalyst A giant clam-shell oven in the background violently bursts open! A dozen flaming, red-hot pearl "meatballs" shoot out like cannonballs. The camera does a lightning-fast matrix-style 360-degree pan around the Octopus as its eyes bug out in comical shock.
[0:06 - 0:10] The Mid-Air Catch The Octopus stretches its tentacles like rubber bands across the screen. We see extreme close-ups of suction cups perfectly catching the flaming pearls in mid-air using frying pans and spatulas. Just as he catches the last one, an electric eel zips through the frame and crashes into a spice rack.
[0:10 - 0:13] The Climax Boom! A massive, slow-motion explosion of glittering, rainbow-colored spice dust fills the screen. The Octopus spins wildly like a purple tornado, using centrifugal force to combine the kelp, the jellyfish dough, and the flaming pearls right in the middle of the glittering dust cloud. The camera rapidly zooms out to show the tornado pulling all the loose pots and pans into its orbit.
[0:13 - 0:15] The Resolution The tornado abruptly stops with a loud POP. The dust clears instantly. The Octopus is breathing heavily, charred black with soot, but holding a flawlessly plated, towering, glowing masterpiece of a dish on a single tentacle. The dish instantly zips down a coral slide out of frame. Cut to black.

title: Cyberpunk Tokyo Alley Fight Sequence
description: An ultra-realistic cinematic video prompt for a cyberpunk fight scene in a rainy Tokyo alley, utilizing handheld camera work and neon atmospheric lighting.
promptText:
STYLE BRIEF: Ultra realistic cinematic cyberpunk. Nighttime Tokyo alley. Heavy rain. The camera doesn't watch the fight it survives it. Handheld, urgent, imperfect. Neon bleeds through rain like open wounds in the dark. Every frame feels stolen.

CHARACTER & ENVIRONMENT CONTINUITY: Both fighters maintain dark tactical hoods and black protective face masks throughout all four shots no exceptions, including during impact. The alley, rainfall intensity, and neon color palette remain locked across the entire sequence.

[00:00–00:04] SHOT 1 | THE CIRCLING
CAMERA: Extreme low-angle handheld nearly flush with the wet asphalt. The lens skims just above the surface of a shimmering puddle. The camera pushes forward slowly, predatorially, between two sets of boots.
ACTION: The two fighters circle one another in tight, measured steps. No wasted movement. No aggression yet only the terrible patience of two people who already know how this ends. Water ripples outward from each footfall like a heartbeat. Then one fighter's weight shifts. A half-second of stillness. Then a savage forward lunge, the first punch thrown like a decision that cannot be undone.
EFFECTS: Rain hammers the pavement in continuous sheets. Each footstep detonates a small explosion of water. Neon reflections red, blue, violet fracture and reassemble across the surface of every puddle. The lens catches a scatter of rain droplets mid-air, backlit against a glowing ramen sign.

[00:04–00:08] — SHOT 2 | THE EXCHANGE
CAMERA: Aggressive shoulder-level handheld, orbiting the fighters in a tight, broken arc the camera operator in the fight, not beside it. The frame cuts and tilts with each impact. Nothing is clean. Everything is alive.
ACTION: The exchange erupts. Fast hands, faster counters. Defensive slips, sharp body strikes, the ugly geometry of two trained fighters in a space too small for comfort. The camera stays inside the action close enough that fighters occasionally eclipse the frame entirely. The fight is not choreographed for the lens. The lens chases it.
EFFECTS: Every footstep detonates water. Rain streaks horizontally across the lens in blurred silver lines. Neon light catches the wet surface of tactical jackets and turns them into mirrors red on black, blue on black. The air is thick with mist and motion.

[00:08–00:12] SHOT 3 | THE MOMENT
CAMERA: Time fractures. The camera swings wide around the attacking fighter in a smooth, almost tender arc and then the world stops. Ultra slow motion descends like a held breath. The camera completes its orbit at eye level, holding on the moment of impact.

ACTION: A single punch. Thrown with everything. It connects and in slow motion, the consequence is enormous. The opponent's head snaps sideways. The hood shifts but holds. The black mask stays sealed to the face unmoved, unbroken even as the skull beneath it absorbs something catastrophic.

title: Tragic Drama Japanese Animation Prompt

promptText:

A warm, flickering key light illuminates her face, casting dramatic shadows. Dimly lit traditional Japanese room with soft volumetric dust particles floating in the air.

3–6s: EXTREME CLOSE-UP on her lips. Her mouth is slightly agape as a silent, shaky sob escapes. A tear drops from her chin and splashes onto the red collar of her kimono, creating a realistic damp darkening spot on the intricate silk fabric.

6–9s: SLOW PROFILE PAN. She slowly bows her head. Strands of her dark hair fall loose across her face, swaying softly with her shallow, heavy breathing. The collarbone and chest muscles tense up naturally under the weight of her grief.

9–12s: MEDIUM SHOT. She slowly opens her glassy, red-rimmed eyes, looking down in despair. A shaft of cold moonlight pierces the sliding paper screens (shoji) in the background, cutting through the volumetric dust. She clutches her red collar with a trembling, pale hand.
12–15s: MACRO SHOT OF HER EYES. Looking slightly off-camera, her glossy eyes reflect a flickering candle flame. The camera slowly pulls back as she lets out a final, shaky exhale, her facial muscles softening into a hollow, numb expression.

title: Alien Army Base Ambush
description: An action-packed cinematic video prompt depicting a giant tentacled alien attacking a remote rainforest military base at night.
promptText:
A jungle base at night, deep in thick wet rainforest. Tents, sandbags, floodlights, a fenced yard with a big diesel generator and fuel drums, and a tall watchtower. A giant alien — brownish-black, slimy, with long whipping tentacles — has attacked the base, wrapped its tentacles around the big generator, and is dragging a soldier across the yard toward it. On the watchtower, a gunner stands at a mounted gun. Sound: humming generator, wet tentacles slapping, shouting men, the alien's low roar, radio voices.

Shot 1 (0–3s) — THE HOOK: Low shot across the floodlit yard. The giant alien crushes the diesel generator in one set of tentacles while another drags a soldier across the mud by his legs. He claws at the ground. Men run between the tents. One shouts into his radio: "IT'S DRAGGING HIM TO THE GENERATOR!"

Shot 2 (3–6s): Up on the watchtower. The gunner swings his mounted gun toward the alien, but holds his fire — the soldier still in the tentacles, fuel drums everywhere. He calls down on the radio: "Break loose! Roll clear!"

Shot 3 (6–9s): At the soldier. He pulls a knife and slashes the slimy tentacle around his legs, breaks free, and rolls clear across the yard. The alien, now empty-handed, lets go of the generator and slides forward into the open middle of the floodlit yard, rearing up tall and clear in the mud.

Shot 4 (9–13s) — BIG SLOW-MOTION MOMENT: The alien is out in the open now, the fuel drums right behind it. The gunner fires. Bullet time — a stream of heavy rounds flies across the yard in slow motion, smoke and shell cases hanging in the air, smashing into the alien and tearing into the fuel drums behind it. The drums burst — a huge fireball blooming around the alien.

Shot 5 (13–15s): Time snaps back. The whole yard lights up as the fuel drums and the alien go up in one rolling fireball, fire and slime shooting into the night sky. Soldiers shield their faces in the mud as the rescued man scrambles clear.

promptText:

Suddenly, cut to Image2. The pace shifts dramatically, slowing to a peaceful glide. The camera gently moves forward along a quiet stream, creating a serene atmosphere filled with birdsong and the feeling of fragrant blossoms in the air.

The camera tilts downward and slowly submerges beneath the water. Soft underwater bubble sound effects accompany the transition. In Image3 and Image4, a graceful school of glowing orange jellyfish drifts elegantly across the camera's view.

promptText:

A young woman holds a large white container of cup yakisoba and eats it deliciously while lifting the noodles with chopsticks. The background shows the blue sea, sandy beach, swimmers, beach umbrellas, and beach huts. Style:
Photorealistic, cinematic, strong natural midsummer light, vibrant blue sky and sea, healthy skin texture, appetizing yakisoba texture. Cool tones during space and descent, transitioning to bright and warm summer colors after approaching the ground.

The final cut must be based on <Image1>. The destination is the coast of the Japanese archipelago. Make the woman, yakisoba, and seaside background the final main subjects. Maintain the continuous feel of a one-cut shot.

title: 3D Chinese Animation Anubis Comedy
description: A detailed multi-scene prompt for a 3D Chinese animation featuring a comedic interaction between the jackal god Anubis and a human inventor with a mechanical tickle arm.
promptText: Modern 3D Chinese animation style. Scene 1: In the center of an Egyptian palace, the majestic jackal god Anubis sits leisurely on his throne, legs stretched out, while his human advisor takes notes on paper. A human inventor approaches Anubis with a small mecha robot. Anubis looks at them nonchalantly and says with a hint of impatience, "Speak, servant." The inventor bows with an eager and respectful attitude and says, "My master, I present to you my latest invention." Anubis looks at the mecha curiously but with some confusion. Scene 2: The inventor takes out a remote control and presses a button. Immediately, two mechanical arms with white gloves extend from the mecha toward Anubis. Anubis just watches them, slightly confused and annoyed but not resisting. Scene 3: The first mechanical arm grabs his wrist and gently lifts his arms over his head. Anubis feels confused and a little uneasy but does not resist. The second mechanical arm reaches for the armpit of Anubis's raised arm and gently tickles his armpit with its fingers, the movement soft and smooth. Anubis's expression instantly brightens, and he closes his eyes, trying to suppress a laugh. But just a second later, Anubis giggles with his eyes closed as the gloved hand tickles his armpit with gentle, fluid finger movements, while the human inventor watches from the side. Scene 4: The second mechanical arm continues to tickle Anubis's armpit, while the first mechanical arm holds Anubis's arm over his head, leaving the armpit exposed. Anubis laughs uncontrollably, his upper body twisting slightly from the laughter, but the first mechanical arm still holds his arm firmly in place. title: Cinematic Assassin Pursuit Sequence
description: A narrative-driven action prompt for a multi-section sequence following an assassin's escape through a moonlit forest.
promptText:
SECTION 1 (0–15s) — The Hunt
A moonlit forest covered in mist. A skilled female assassin, Rin, sprints through the trees with incredible speed while armed soldiers chase her. The camera switches between close-ups of her determined eyes, her boots hitting the ground, and the pursuers crashing through branches.
Enemy: "There she is! Don't let her escape!"
Commander (radio): "Cut her off! She can't get far!"
Earpiece: "Rin, they're surrounding you. Head for the cliff!"
Rin (calmly): "I'm counting on it."
She accelerates deeper into the forest.
SECTION 2 (15–30s) — The Fight
Two enemies suddenly block her path. She stops instantly. The forest falls silent for a moment.
Enemy: "It's over. Drop your weapon."
Rin gives a faint smile.
Rin: "You should've stayed out of my way."
An intense fight erupts. She dodges a knife, disarms one attacker, throws him into a tree, spins behind the second, and knocks him unconscious with a precise strike. More enemies rush in from every direction.
Commander: "Move! She's heading for the cliff!"
Rin glances ahead and starts running again
SECTION 3 (30–45s) — The Final Leap
Rin reaches the edge of a towering cliff overlooking a violent ocean. Dozens of armed soldiers surround her with rifles aimed.
Commander: "You're out of options. Surrender."
Rin slowly turns to face them, completely fearless.
Rin: "You think this is the end..."
She steps backward toward the edge.
Rin: "...this is only the beginning."
She leaps off the cliff in slow motion. The soldiers rush to the edge and look down.
A huge splash echoes through the night.
The water below slowly turns crimson red, spreading across the waves.
The commander whispers,
Commander: "...What have we done?"
Cut to black.

No posing. No fashion look. No perfect composition. No stabilization. No cinematic glamour. No modern grading. No music.

title: 3D Cartoon Anime Girl with Pudding
description: An incredibly detailed animation prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a cute white-haired girl in a kitchen. It includes timestamped scene directions, comical character acting with 'pose-to-pose' dynamics, and specific camera movement instructions for a 15-second sequence.
promptText:
Use the girl from Image1 as a reference character. Japanese full-color anime style, keep identity consistent. Maintain her outfit, hairstyle, hair parting, clothing silhouette, and a cute, soft atmosphere. Strictly adhere to the character sheet.

A 15-second sophisticated cell-shaded 3D animation. Not realistic live-action, but exaggerated 3D cartoon animation acting. Delicate facial features, expressive eyes, clean outlines, soft skin shadows, detailed clothing textures, glowing magic particles, moonlight, cinematic depth of field, and dramatic rim lighting. Subdued outlines. Ensure expressions, eyes, eyebrows, mouth, and poses are clearly readable in the video.

The setting is a spacious, high-end island kitchen with a large counter, storage in the background, a refrigerator, hanging lights, a wide floor, and a sense of depth. A single premium pudding with shimmering golden caramel is placed on the central counter. The pudding must remain an important focal object throughout. Maintain consistent positioning between the kitchen, counter, and pudding in all shots.

Acting should be stylized. Movements must be large, fast, sharp, and comical with 'snappy pose-to-pose' timing. Smooth constant-velocity movement is prohibited. Each action should include a pause, a short buildup, explosive acceleration, large overshoot, recoil, a complete stop, and a secondary motion where hair and sleeves sway with a delay. Insert a short freeze at the end of major poses. Maintain the integrity of the body shape and costume.

Facial expressions should be exaggerated. Quickly switch the eyes, eyebrows, mouth, cheeks, gaze, and neck angle at key moments. Use expressions like wary narrowed eyes, one eyebrow raised in suspicion, wide-eyed surprise, sideways glancing, a mischievous smirk, tense puffed cheeks, starry discovery eyes, a moved expression, and a happy satisfied smile. Keep it cute while emphasizing the comical scale of expressions.

0.0–1.5s: Ultra-wide shot of the island kitchen. Golden pudding on the center counter. Caramel glints. The girl's white hair pops up briefly from behind the counter and pulls back.
1.5–3.0s: The girl slowly peeks out from behind the counter, starting with just her eyes. She watches the pudding with wary, narrowed eyes and raises an eyebrow. Suddenly, her eyes widen and sparkle. She stands with a finger pointed, back against the counter side, then stops dead as her hair and sleeves catch up.
3.0–4.8s: First major move. She crouches small, then explosively leaps sideways from the counter's shadow with short afterimages and subtle speed lines. She overshoots the arrival point, hurries back to cling to the counter. Expressions switch between serious, surprised, impatient, and smirking. Stops completely with a large secondary sway in her hair and clothes.
4.8–6.5s: Moves further to the shadows of the fridge. Rapid toe-stepping followed by a sudden zip. The camera follows with a quick pan and slight tilt. Arrives with an exaggerated one-legged balance pose with arms spread. Switches through a sideways suspicious glance to a confident smirk.
6.5–8.5s: Cartoon-style exaggerated sneak toward the counter. For each step: pause, foot forward, body catches up, head overshoots, recoil, stop dead. Gaze switches between pudding, left, right, behind. Sudden brake near counter with hair/sleeves flowing forward then back.
8.5–10.5s: Main discovery scene. Peeks from under the counter, eyes first, then looks at the pudding. Eyes widen with star sparkles, eyebrows jump, cheeks redden. Stretches up with hands on the counter. Switches to moved, entranced, and smirking faces. Ends in a pose freeze.
10.5–12.5s: Gently lifts the pudding. Concentrates first, then pulls it quickly to her chest. Momentum carries her back then forward. Shivers with joy. Transitions through serious, surprised, and smirking faces to a sparkling expectant face. Quick camera zoom to the pudding with a spoon.
12.5–14.2s: Maximum reaction to tasting. As she tastes a spoonful, a one-frame impact pose where shoulders and hair jump up. Small shockwave reaction. Cheeks redden as she holds her face. Quickly switches through surprised, moved, and happy expressions.
14.2–15.0s: Final pose. Holds her cheek with one hand and the plate with the other. Narrows her eyes and smiles happily. Body stops completely while hair and clothes sway in the aftermath. Camera zooms in on her happy expression for a satisfying final shot.

Camera work: Use ultra-wide shots, sudden zooms, low angles, slight Dutch angles, quick pans, and short cut-ins. Use strong zooms during the discovery and tasting moments. Ensure the spatial relationship between the face, pudding, and counter remains clear.

title: Continuous Seamless Sketchbook Fantasy World
description: A long-form cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 that creates a seamless transition from a child's bedroom drawing to a vast 3D fantasy world with forests, oceans, and dragons.
promptText: Single uninterrupted cinematic shot begins inside a cozy child's bedroom during golden afternoon light. Sunbeams stream through the window, illuminating floating dust particles. Colored pencils, brushes, and scattered sketchbooks cover a wooden desk. The atmosphere feels warm, peaceful, and filled with creative energy. The camera slowly glides toward an open sketchbook. A child finishes drawing a simple green tree with a colored pencil. As the final stroke touches the paper, the ink begins glowing softly. Leaves gently rustle although there is no wind. Tiny particles of light rise from the page. Without any cut, the camera dives directly into the drawing. The flat paper transforms seamlessly into a vast three-dimensional forest. The camera flies between enormous ancient trees covered in moss. Shafts of sunlight filter through the canopy while birds soar overhead. Butterflies drift naturally through the air. Every leaf moves realistically in the breeze. The transition from paper to reality is completely seamless. The child draws a blue river. Instantly the forest floor opens into a crystal-clear river flowing through the landscape. The camera follows the rushing water at high speed before bursting through a waterfall into an endless ocean. Waves sparkle under the sunlight while giant whales leap gracefully beside the camera. Schools of colorful fish swim beneath the surface. Everything feels alive and physically believable. The child adds distant mountains. Massive snow-covered peaks rise naturally from the horizon as if the world is creating itself. The camera races through valleys and climbs above the mountains into the clouds. The child sketches a dragon soaring across the page. Golden lines become shimmering scales as a majestic dragon comes to life. Instead of attacking, it flies peacefully beside the camera. The camera circles around the dragon while sunlight reflects across its wings. The dragon glides effortlessly through floating islands suspended above the clouds. The child paints stars across the page. The blue sky slowly transforms into deep space while the floating islands drift among colorful nebulae. Entire galaxies appear in the distance. Planets rotate naturally while glowing comets streak silently across the background. The child places one final glowing star in the corner of the drawing. The camera flies toward it until it fills the entire screen. The star suddenly becomes the reflection inside the child's eye. The camera gently pulls back to reveal the child smiling at the finished drawing. The sketchbook now appears ordinary again, but tiny glowing particles continue drifting upward from its pages, hinting that imagination never truly disappears. The final frame holds on the child's smile as warm sunlight fills the room. Camera: One continuous uninterrupted shot. Smooth floating camera movement. Seamless transitions between every environment. Natural acceleration and graceful curves.

title: Tang Dynasty Beauty Garden Video
description: A documentary-style video prompt for Seedance 2.0 depicting a Tang Dynasty beauty in a garden setting, emphasizing realistic skin textures and subtle, natural micro-expressions.
promptText:
FIRST FRAME (=Upload reference image, used only for initial pose, character moves naturally afterwards):

Tang Dynasty beauty with dark hair in a high bun, a red peony pinned next to a golden step-shake hairpiece, flower ornament on the forehead.

Wearing an off-white sheer gauze outer cape over a crimson and orange gold-traced tube top ruqun dress, hands naturally folded in front of the body.

Peony bushes nearby, Forbidden City towers in the background, warm golden sunset light, fine dust floating in the air.

Character features, makeup, and attire are consistent with the first frame; limbs remain naturally relaxed and not stiff throughout.

Core Requirement: Documentary-style live-action performance texture, removing all "AI flavor"—skin with real pores and fine fuzz, oily sheen, and visible rhythmic breathing; micro-expressions with imperfect realism (occasional eye wandering, corner of the mouth moving slightly before smiling, irregular blinking rhythm, occasional subtle movements like swallowing, pursing lips, or shifting weight).

STORYBOARD (Minimal dialogue, emphasis on realistic detailed performance):

SHOT 1 | 0-4s | Medium Close-up (Handheld, slight breathing shake)
She looks down at her folded hands, fingertips unconsciously fiddling with her belt, shifting weight from one foot to the other, shoulders relaxing; then drawn to the peonies beside her, naturally looking up and sideways, eyes leading the head turn.
No dialogue, only natural breathing and environmental sounds (wind, distant birds).

SHOT 2 | 4-7s | Face Close-up (Eye acting)
Camera pushes toward the face: irregular blinking, subtle focus shifts in the pupils, nostrils fluttering slightly with breath, lips pursing briefly before a real faint smile spreads, the smile starting from the eyes—not a formulaic standard smile.
[Barely a whisper, one line] "These flowers... are blooming so well."

SHOT 3 | 7-11s | Waist-up action
She reaches out to touch a peony petal, finger pads sinking realistically into the softness; wrist turns naturally, gauze sleeve sliding down, she subconsciously pulls it back with the other hand, body turning slightly, stray hairs blown by the wind sticking to her cheek. Frame is full of real, unintentional small movements. No dialogue.

SHOT 4 | 11-15s | Return to Medium Close-up (Closure, natural freeze)
She pulls back her hand, gaze returning forward, exhaling softly, eyes carrying a touch of realistic melancholy yet relief; lips move as if to say something but ultimately stop, ending with a smile that isn't perfect but very real, naturally freezing at that moment.
[Whisper, fading, like to herself] "...that's fine too."

AUDIO SETTINGS: Female voice, natural and lifelike, mostly breathy, speed varies with emotion, not overly articulated, with realistic breathing pauses; only two very short whispers throughout.

CAMERA: Handheld texture (subtle natural shake and breathing feel), multi-shot: MCU / Face Close-up / Half-body / back to MCU, natural transitions; realistic shallow depth of field, occasional subtle focus breathing, background palaces and peonies blurred.

ATMOSPHERE/LIGHTING: Natural golden hour light, rim lighting on hair, warm tones; floating dust, occasional falling petals, gauze and hair moving with a real breeze, overall look like film footage, fine grain, soft highlights.

CONSTRAINTS:
- 4K Ultra HD, 15 seconds, makeup/clothing consistent with the first frame.
- Core: Live documentary performance—real skin texture, irregular blinking, natural weight shifting, micro-expressions with "imperfect realism," strictly no stiffness or plastic faces.
- De-AI: Avoid excessive skin smoothing, perfect symmetry, or perfect smiles.
- Two lines strictly synced with mouth movements, breathy/lifelike, no broadcasting voice.
- Wind, falling flowers, sleeves, and hair follow real physics.
- Eyes must be expressive with real focus wandering; no glowing eyes or abnormal pupils.
- Ends naturally with residual movement, no black screen or transitions.
- No subtitles, watermarks, symbols, or text.

title: Storybook Superhero Animation
description: A multi-part storyboard prompt for a children's book-style animation featuring two superhero cousins in a watercolor world, with specific scene descriptions and cuts.
promptText:
PART 1 — "A GOLDEN MORNING" (0–15 seconds)
Visual Style: Soft watercolor illustration, warm pastel palette, gentle painted textures, thick storybook outlines, Pixar-meets-picture-book warmth. Every frame should look like it could be lifted from a printed children's book page.
 Music: Gentle music box melody, soft and dreamy.

✂️ CUT 1 — The Town Wakes Up (0–3s)

Storybook illustrated wide shot of a tiny golden town at sunrise. Cobblestone streets, pastel shop fronts, flowers in window boxes. Soft watercolor sky in peach and lavender. A warm narrator title card fades in like a book page turning. Camera gently pushes forward. No characters yet — just the world breathing awake. Painterly, soft, magical. Children's picture book aesthetic.

✂️ CUT 2 — They Appear (3–6s)

Illustrated medium shot. Two heroic girls stroll into frame side by side down the golden street. The blonde girl has long wavy golden hair catching the morning light, bright blue eyes, wearing a blue superhero shirt with a red-and-gold crest, a flowing tan coat and red skirt. Beside her, a tall dark-haired girl in a full navy blue superhero suit with a flowing red cape. Both hold iced drinks with green straws. They walk in easy, comfortable silence. Warm amber light. Storybook illustration style — soft outlines, gentle cel-shading, children's book warmth.

✂️ CUT 3 — The Little Girl Watches (6–9s)

Storybook close-up at child's eye level. A tiny girl with pigtails presses her nose against a bakery window, eyes wide with wonder as the two superhero cousins pass outside. Illustrated golden reflections on the glass. Warm, tender, magical. The moment feels frozen — like a painting inside a book. No dialogue. Just wonder.

🗣️ Only Dialogue in Part 1:

KARA: (kneeling gently to the little girl, soft smile) "The real kind. Just like you'll be someday."

✂️ CUT 4 — The Cloud Arrives (9–12s)

Illustrated wide shot. The warm golden sky above the town slowly shifts. A single large storybook storm cloud — illustrated with soft curling edges, not scary, like a cloud from a picture book — drifts in from the horizon. The cousins look up slowly. Their expressions go calm and ready. Camera tilts upward toward the cloud. The warm light dims slightly to cool lilac. Still painterly and safe — this is a children's story.

✂️ CUT 5 — Drinks Down. Capes Up. (12–15s)

Slow illustrated close-up. Two iced drinks placed gently side by side on a low stone wall. Camera pulls back in slow motion. The cousins stand tall, side by side, capes beginning to lift in the rising wind. Their silhouettes are bold and warm against the shifting sky. The frame freezes — like the last illustration before a chapter turn. Storybook page texture overlays softly. Painterly. Heroic. Tender.

title: Evolutionary Journey Cinematic Shot
description: A single continuous take depicting the timeline of evolution from prehistoric aquatic life to dinosaurs, mammoths, early humans, and modern civilization.
promptText:
Duration: 15 seconds

A single uninterrupted cinematic shot begins at sunrise on a prehistoric shoreline. The camera glides inches above crystal-clear water as tiny ripples shimmer under soft golden light. Microscopic life drifts beneath the surface, creating a quiet sense of anticipation.

At the third second, the camera follows a primitive fish swimming toward the shore. As it reaches shallow water, its fins gradually strengthen into limbs. Bones, muscles, skin, and posture evolve naturally in one continuous transformation while it crawls onto land. Every stage is smooth and biologically believable with no sudden morphing.

Without cutting, the camera gently circles the creature while keeping perfect pace beside it. As it walks forward, millions of years pass around it. Giant ferns rise from the earth, dense prehistoric forests spread across the landscape, and the climate becomes warmer. The creature slowly transforms into a powerful dinosaur. Its skeleton reshapes, muscles expand, scales develop intricate textures, and its movements remain fluid and lifelike.

The camera continues tracking alongside the dinosaur. A bright meteor streaks silently across the distant sky. Dust gradually fills the atmosphere as the environment changes into a frozen world. Snow begins falling, glaciers appear, and the dinosaur slowly evolves into a woolly mammoth. Thick fur grows naturally, tusks curl outward, and each breath forms visible clouds in the cold air.

Time continues accelerating. Ice melts into green valleys while the mammoth gradually transforms into an early human. Fur disappears, posture straightens, hands become dexterous, and simple stone tools appear in the environment. The human never stops walking.

As the camera smoothly moves to the front, civilization unfolds around the traveler. Primitive camps become farming villages. Villages become ancient cities. Stone buildings become castles. Castles become industrial towns. Steam gives way to electricity. Roads become highways. Skyscrapers rise toward the sky. Vehicles evolve from horse-drawn carts to modern transportation while aircraft leave elegant trails overhead. The environment transforms continuously without any cuts.

Near the end, the modern explorer naturally evolves into a futuristic space explorer wearing an advanced exploration suit assembled piece by piece around the body. The landscape transitions into the surface of another world beneath a sky filled with distant planets.

The explorer walks toward the horizon. The camera slowly moves closer until only the reflective visor fills the frame. Inside the reflection, every previous stage of evolution appears walking together in perfect harmony, symbolizing the continuous journey of life.

The final shot reveals a distant blue planet rising over the horizon as soft sunlight illuminates the explorer, ending with a feeling of hope, discovery, and endless possibility.

promptText:
Scene: A seamless ultra-cinematic one-take shot starting from deep space and ending in an intimate café moment. The sequence emphasizes speed, scale, and immersive transition from cosmic to human scale.

Subject / Character: Final subject is @img1 — a young woman sitting in an open-air café named “LUMOS”, wearing denim shorts and a white shirt, casually eating a hamburger with a drink beside her.

Action Timeline (TOTAL: 15s):

0–4s (Space → Earth Approach):
Wide cinematic shot of Earth in deep space. Camera accelerates forward smoothly. Earth rapidly grows in frame. Subtle light streaks, atmospheric glow becomes visible. Motion builds gradually but feels grand.

4–8s (Atmospheric Entry → Fast Descent):
Camera pierces atmosphere with intense glow and motion blur. Clouds rush past. Continents and terrain sweep underneath at high speed. Strong sense of acceleration.

8–11s (City Dive → Street Flow):
Camera locks onto a city and dives sharply. Skyscrapers rise fast. Transition into street-level movement — fluid glide through streets, passing buildings, corners, and urban elements with dynamic motion.

11–12s (Café Target Lock):
Camera spots outdoor café with large “LUMOS” sign. Rapid but smooth deceleration begins. Focus tightens.

12–15s (Final Scene – Character):
Camera settles into a medium shot of @img1. She sits casually, eating a hamburger, drink on table. Natural motion (taking a bite, relaxed posture). Warm, calm contrast to previous high-speed sequence.

Camera:
One continuous shot, no cuts. Extreme speed ramping: slow → ultra-fast → controlled slowdown. Wide lens in space → natural cinematic lens at final shot. Smooth stabilization with slight handheld realism at the end.

Audio:
Cinematic rise from deep space ambience → intense whooshing during descent → city ambience → soft café sounds (light chatter, ambient noise).

Style:
Cinematic color grading: cool tones in space/descent → gradually warmer tones at street/café. High contrast, subtle film grain, volumetric lighting, atmospheric particles, ultra-detailed, 8K, photorealistic.

title: Surreal Alien Jungle Hoverbike Chase
description: A first-person POV continuous take through a bioluminescent fungal forest, featuring speed-ramping and an ultra-slow-motion macro encounter with an alien insect.
promptText:
Cinematography: First-person POV, naturalistic unconstrained human vision. Authentic head movement with organic micro-tremor, subtle wind-shake, and reactive eye-line tracking.

Lighting: surrealistic alien twilight. High-contrast natural light through a dense canopy. Underlit by vibrant bioluminescent glow from the fungal forest.

Color: 60:30:10 — dominant deep indigo and violet 60% / secondary neon magenta, cyan, toxic green 30% / accent warm amber-gold (hoverbike dashboard) 10%.

Camera: wide-angle cine lens (24mm). 180° shutter motion blur. Speed-ramping (24fps to 240fps and back). Extreme macro depth-of-field transition.

Physics: inertia and wind resistance felt through the camera. Particles and spores obey aerodynamic drag.

SUBJECTS:

pure first-person vision, no helmet, no HUD. At the bottom of the frame, the rider's hands grip the handlebars of a heavy hoverbike, fingers adjusting the throttle.

a surreal iridescent macro-insect — double-layered translucent oil-slick wings, a neon-cyan segmented body pulsing with bioluminescence, large multi-faceted magenta eyes.

LOCATION: a bizarre fantasy jungle at twilight, towering twisted mega-mushrooms pulsing with toxic green and magenta light. Glowing spores drift like ash.

ACTION — ONE CONTINUOUS TAKE, NO cuts. 15 seconds.

0:00–0:04 — High-velocity real-time POV (24fps): the hoverbike flies low and fast, weaving through a narrow opening; the camera tilts into turns; spores streak past.

0:04–0:05 — The jolt: as the bike clips a glowing stalk, the alien fly flashes in from camera-left — a sudden jump-scare. The camera flinches (a micro-jerk back and right). Time violently freezes into extreme slow-motion.

0:05–0:11 — Ultra slow-motion macro (240fps): near standstill. The alien fly drifts past the lens at macro distance, centimeters from the eye — every microscopic detail visible, oil-slick wings scattering the neon light, spores parting around it, horizontal anamorphic magenta flares across the lens.

0:11–0:15 — Instant speed-ramp back (24fps): the fly snaps past camera-right and vanishes; time cracks back with a rush of wind, the engine roars, the rider corrects and accelerates deeper into the forest.

CONSTRAINTS: 16:9. ONE CONTINUOUS POV SHOT — no cuts. No screen borders or helmet graphics. Photoreal throughout.

AUDIO (NO MUSIC): heavy mechanical hum and high-RPM whine, high-speed wind. At 0:04, a caught breath. During slow-mo, wind drops into a muffled vacuum replaced by the deep thump-thump of the fly's wings and the rider's heartbeat. At 0:11, a sonic whoosh as reality snaps back.

promptText:

A small cramped studio apartment with a thin mattress, rumpled sheets, scattered clothes, a narrow hallway, tiny wash area with a cracked mirror, and a cluttered kitchenette.

The woman wears an oversized faded t-shirt, soft lounge shorts, and is barefoot. Slightly messy hair, faint smudged kajal under her eyes, tired expression, moving slowly like she is repeating a daily routine on autopilot.

She walks into the kitchenette, moves a plate aside, picks up a steel tumbler, then pauses completely still. She takes another drag from the cigarette.

After a few seconds, she slowly lifts her head and looks directly into the camera. She exhales smoke upward toward the lens and never breaks eye contact.

promptText:
WHEN SHE BECOMES THE BUTTERFLIES
30 Seconds • 16:9 
ENVIRONMENT LOCK

Open grassy hilltop at golden hour transitioning into deep indigo twilight. Rolling yellow-green grass, strong wind, no buildings or other characters.

PART 1 — THE CONFRONTATION (0:00–0:15)
P01

Both warriors stand fifteen meters apart. Low-angle 85mm. She adopts a genuine combat stance while he raises his water sword. Butterflies and water slowly gather.

P02

He lunges first with a horizontal slash. She sidesteps, parries, immediately counters with a fast slash. Sparks, water and butterflies explode at blade contact.

P03

She launches an aggressive three-hit sword combination. He blocks while retreating before creating a towering water column. She vaults over it using the momentum.

P04

Mid-air duel. Five rapid sword clashes. Butterflies and water collide with every strike. She flips away after kicking off his blade.

P05

She lands into a low slide, attacks his legs, transitions into upward and reverse slashes. He blocks with a curved wall of rushing water.

P06

Both charge directly toward each other. She thrusts forward while he delivers an overhead strike. Their weapons lock inches from the camera.

Freeze on her blazing green eyes and glowing lightsaber tip.

PART 2 — THE CLIMAX (0:15–0:30)

IMPORTANT: Begin from the exact frozen last frame of Part 1 with identical camera, pose, lighting, expressions and sword positions before motion resumes.

P07

Their blades collide violently. Close-quarters sword lock. She twists free and launches a rapid counterattack while water and butterflies burst across the frame.

P08

Fast sword exchange. She unleashes a relentless five-hit combination. He blocks and counters using rotating water currents. Every strike has realistic weight and purpose.

P09

She performs her strongest attack, creating an enormous storm of iridescent butterflies that completely engulfs the battlefield. He disappears inside the butterfly cloud.

P10

Bird's-eye view. Butterfly vortex surrounds her. He calmly finds an opening and lands one perfectly timed thrust through the vortex. Silence. She smiles peacefully.

P11

The wound glows. Her body gently dissolves from the feet upward into thousands of real iridescent butterflies. Her lightsaber transforms into butterflies. Her smiling face disappears last as soft laughter echoes across the hill.

P12

The Water Duelist stands alone beneath the indigo sky. His sword lowers. One butterfly lands on his fingertip. He smiles gently. The camera cranes upward as thousands of butterflies drift into the sky. Fade to black.

title: Hyper-Realistic Bike Flood Escape
description: A detailed action sequence prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a motorcyclist escaping a flash flood in an industrial underground tunnel.
promptText:

Inside a large underground maintenance tunnel at night, a rider on a sleek fast bike races forward as a violent surge of water floods through the tunnel behind them. The environment is industrial and clear: concrete tunnel walls, overhead pipes, support beams, service lights, metal walkways, warning lights, and wet reflective surfaces. 
The rider wears dark fitted riding gear and a full helmet with dark visor. No visible face.

Wide opening shot: the rider speeds through the maintenance tunnel at high speed. Far behind, a wall of floodwater bursts into the tunnel and begins rushing forward. Tunnel lights reflect on the wet ground.
Side tracking shot: the rider accelerates through the tunnel while water surges closer behind. The bike weaves past support pillars, pipes, and simple maintenance obstacles. The tunnel lights begin failing one by one, going dark in sequence as the rider passes.

Front three-quarter shot: the rider keeps moving fast as water rises and spreads across the floor. Spray kicks up around the tires. Warning lights flash red.

Final 5 seconds: the pace becomes more intense. The rider pushes to maximum speed as the floodwater closes in. More tunnel lights go dark. The rider leans low, races through the narrowing opening, and escapes just before the heavy flood gate finishes closing. The water slams into the gate from the other side.
Final moment: the rider skids to a stop in the safer corridor beyond the gate while water crashes against the sealed barrier behind.

title: National Geographic African Cheetah Hunt Documentary
description: A multi-shot, cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 that generates a high-definition wildlife documentary sequence of a cheetah hunting in the savanna at sunset, complete with telephoto close-ups and high-speed tracking shots.
promptText:
[Style] National Geographic African Wildlife Documentary, 4K UHD, Super Telephoto Photography (800mm Telephoto), High-Speed Tracking Vehicle Shot (120fps), East African Savanna Golden Hour Lighting
[Duration] 10 seconds
[Scene] The East African savanna at dusk, with waist-high golden withered grass. The skyline features the silhouette of a massive acacia tree. The low-hanging sun on the horizon dyes the entire grassland deep gold, with ground heat waves distorting the distant view.
[00:00-00:04] Shot 1: Eyes in the Grass (Telephoto Close-Up 800mm, Shallow DOF)
A super telephoto close-up with shallow depth of field: the frame is filled with golden grass, hiding all animals. Suddenly, a pair of amber eyes appear through a gap in the grass—a female cheetah crouching low, with only the area from her eyes to her ear tips visible. Black tear marks extend from the corners of her eyes to her mouth, and her nose has a rough, black leathery texture. Her pupils contract sharply into vertical slits as she locks onto prey. Her ears press back against her skull. The foreground and background grass blur into golden bokeh, leaving only the cheetah's eyes sharp and clear.
[00:04-00:07] Shot 2: Full Speed Burst (High-Speed Tracking 120fps, Side Profile)
Side high-speed tracking shot: The cheetah launches from the grass into a full sprint at 100 km/h. In slow motion, her spine bends like a spring and then fully extends—hind legs overshooting the front legs during bending, and the body stretching into a horizontal line with all limbs airborne during extension. Dry grass and red soil are kicked up in fans by her paws at each stride. The white fur on her belly ripples with the rhythm of the run, and her tail acts like a rudder, swinging to one side during sharp turns. Her facial muscles are tense, mouth slightly open to reveal fangs, and nostrils extremely dilated.
[00:07-00:10] Shot 3: The End in the Dust (Super Slow-mo, Head-On Tracking)
Frontal super slow-motion head-on tracking shot: The cheetah sprints directly toward the camera, leaving a three-meter-high trail of golden dust. It makes a sudden sharp turn—all four paws dig into the ground, creating four soil grooves, as the body leans almost parallel to the ground and the tail arcs in the opposite direction. The dust kicked up at the moment of the turn forms a curved golden wall, backlit by the setting sun, illuminating each particle like floating golden stardust. The silhouette of the cheetah emerging from the dust wall gradually dissolves into the golden light of the sunset.

title: Dynamic Rhythm Camera Dance
description: A sophisticated timeline-based prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed for dance videos, featuring high-frequency camera micro-vibrations and synchronized beat-driven movements.
promptText:
Concept: The camera never stops for a second. Another dancer who constantly moves in small increments at the highest speed and minimum amplitude.
The basic rhythm is a high density of 16th notes (1 beat divided into 4) or more, and at each interval, the camera must perform one of the following: flick, tick, zoom in, or zoom out. Do not create static frames. Even during key poses, the camera continues high-frequency micro-vibrations, maintaining the composition; even if it appears to stop, it is actually pulsing in small increments. No lazy medium-speed movement. Movement always has sharp snap motion start and end points, with no slow interpolation in between.
Micro-motions to run constantly throughout (fastest, small amplitude, high frequency):
Continuous micro-zooms (fast round trips of zooming in/out by a few % at each interval, pulsing incessantly)
Beat bounce (camera keeps bouncing small up and down in sync with foot steps/knee dips)
Jitter pan (small sharp pans left and right in time with shoulder hits/head shakes)
Micro-shake (sharp shake of a few pixels on strong beats, immediately to the next interval)
High-speed reframing (continuously fine-tuning composition every 16th note to keep the pair in the best position)
Micro-orbit oscillation (continuous small-angle swaying left and right around the central axis)
Instantaneous synchronization per body part (sharp and fast):
Shoulder hit -> Camera snaps in the opposite direction
Fingertips/arm lines -> Zoom follows the trajectory at high speed
Head shake/hair flutter -> Camera also swings sharply in the same direction and immediately returns
Waist wave/body roll -> Camera undulates vertically in small increments
Spot turn -> Camera circles in small increments in reverse rotation
Large-scale 'projectiles' (deployed at top speed at key moments, but micro-vibrations do not stop after deployment):
Snap zoom (reaches destination instantly at top speed, continues micro-zooming after arrival)
Whip pan (swings between the two at top speed, transitions to micro-vibration hold at the peak)
Rapid crane dive/crane up
High-speed 360-degree orbit
Dolly zoom (background expansion/contraction, one-shot)
Floor-level low angle to rapid ascent
Dutch angle (bold tilt at key moments, micro-vibrating while tilted)

Rhythm Principles:
Throughout: The camera does not stop for a single frame, ticking at the fastest speed and minimum amplitude.
Strong beats: Layer large movements over micro-motions (do not stop ticking).
Key poses: Not complete stillness, but a 'micro-vibration hold'. Composition is fixed, but the camera lives on in small increments.
If they turn, the camera reverses; it leaps for jumps, retreats when they advance, reacting to everything at top speed.
Connect everything with flowing live-program-style switching rather than hard cuts.

[15-Second Composition]
0.0–2.0s: From an ultra-wide shot near the ceiling, deploy a crane dive + snap zoom at top speed on the first beat to drop into a bust-up two-shot. Simultaneously with landing, micro-zooms and beat bounces start pulsing and never stop. Both perform shoulder, head, and waist isolation simultaneously; at each hit, the camera snaps back and forth. Even a smile to the camera is captured with a micro-vibration hold.
2.0–4.0s: Orbit halfway around the central axis at high speed while continuous micro-zooms pulse at 16th notes. Side-by-side steps / one-handed hearts / chest-level hearts / finger pointing (mirrored choreography), bouncing up and down with each step. Do not stop at the peak; transition to a micro-vibration hold to capture hair afterimages.
4.0–6.0s: Low-angle floor-level shot. Camera undulates vertically for body rolls/waist waves. Jitter pan left and right for every shoulder hit. Rapid crane-up ascent from the feet. Smiling with chin up is also captured with a micro-vibration hold + Dutch angle (tilting while shaking).
6.0–8.0s: Snap zoom to one person -> whip pan for the exchange to the other. Micro-shakes continue sharply even after zooming. Lip-sync, cheek piece / one-handed heart / head tilt. Zoom follows fingertips at high speed. Micro-vibration hold for expressions at the peak.
8.0–10.0s: One full high-speed 360-degree orbit while both perform high-speed spot turns (symmetrical). Camera circles in reverse in small increments, transitioning to micro-orbit oscillation without stopping. Meeting one-handed hearts to form one big heart, pulsing the micro-zoom at minimum amplitude at that moment.
10.0–12.0s (Chorus): Fast punch-out to wide shot. Large duet dance across the stage. Diagonal movement -> central gathering, beat bounce sync on all steps. Camera jumps in sync with their leap. Large arm lines in unison, zoom follows the path. One dolly zoom at the start of the chorus, micro-shaking continues during expansion.
12.0–14.0s: Repeated fast punch-outs and punch-ins to rapidly vary distance. Even as they lean in close, the camera ticks in and out at 16th notes. Eye contact / finger to lens, zoom follows the finger in small increments. Soft smiles captured with micro-vibration hold.
14.0–15.0s (Killing Part): As they step in and lean together, a top-speed snap zoom + whip pierces into a close-up two-shot. Do not stop completely upon arrival; finish with a micro-vibration hold at the highest frequency/minimum amplitude to showcase poses, smiles, and synchronized winks. A finish that appears stopped but is alive.

title: Cinematic Skyscraper Rooftop Escape
description: A high-intensity action sequence prompt featuring operatives sprinting across a skyscraper roof before a glass floor collapses.
promptText:
Hyper-realistic cinematic action sequence, 15 seconds, aspect ratio 16:9.

Night. On the rooftop of a tall modern skyscraper, two anonymous operatives, one man and one woman, run side by side across the roof while a security team follows behind. Both operatives wear dark tactical clothing with full hoods or dark visors, faces mostly hidden in shadow. No clear facial close-ups, no celebrity resemblance, no famous actor look, no heroic movie-star face.

The rooftop is sleek and simple, with metal sections, vents, warning lights, and one large transparent glass section. The city glows far below with lights and light mist.
Wide opening shot: the two operatives sprint across the rooftop, staying close together. The security team is behind them and getting closer.

Tracking shot: the operatives run onto the glass section because it appears solid. Fine cracks suddenly spread under their feet. They react with surprise and try to keep balance.

Critical action beat: the glass section suddenly gives way beneath them. The floor disappears under their feet. They do not jump. They lose support unexpectedly and vanish downward through the opening as the glass breaks apart.
For a moment, it seems like they disappeared over the side of the skyscraper.

title: Frost Dragon Glacier Fortress Attack

promptText:
1. CREATION BRIEF

Generate an original 15-second dark-fantasy cinematic sequence in vertical 9:16 aspect ratio at 720p resolution. The video is a single sustained spectacle of a colossal pale bone-white frost dragon attacking a frozen mountain stronghold carved into a glacier cliff. The dragon is the unambiguous protagonist of every frame: it bursts up through a frozen lake in an explosion of shattered ice, climbs a sheer ice-clad fortress wall ripping through hanging defensive chains and frozen ballista nests, exhales a torrent of freezing breath that flash-rimes a watchtower into a brittle crystal husk, then slams its tail through that frozen tower so it shatters into glittering shards, before the camera pulls back to reveal a vast high-angle panorama of the glacial citadel cracking apart under a green aurora sky. The mood is cold, awe-inspiring, merciless, otherworldly. Pale aurora light battles deep arctic blue gloom throughout. Dense ice-fog and snow-spray roll across the frame, scattering aurora light into shimmering veils. Scale must read MASSIVE — the dragon is many times larger than any human, who appear as tiny dark fur-wrapped figures on the walls. Pacing is fast and kinetic with hard cuts on impacts, settling into a stabilized epic final reveal. Photoreal CGI, no stylization, no cartoon look. Every motion obeys heavy gravity and inertia.

2. STYLE BIBLE

Medium: realistic high-budget feature-film CGI, photoreal rendering, ray-traced lighting, physically based shading, subsurface scattering on ice and snow. Zero illustration or anime stylization, zero painterly look. Lens language: cinematic full-frame virtual cinematography, focal lengths roughly 24–50mm; wide anamorphic-feeling framing for the lake burst and climb beats, slightly longer for the breath and tail beats; shallow-to-medium depth of field with atmospheric ice-fog providing natural depth falloff and visible particulate. Color palette: a desaturated cold base of glacier blue, steel cyan, frost white, slate grey, deep teal shadow — punctuated by ethereal aurora greens and faint violets dancing overhead, with cold blue-white glow from the dragon's breath and occasional warm flickers of dying torchlight on the fortress walls (1900K) reading almost amber against the all-blue world. Lighting setup: key from a broad aurora-lit night sky (cool, roughly 7500–9000K, with animated green ribbon glow), strong cyan rim from glacier surfaces, bounce fill from snow, faint warm torch fill from defenders, brilliant cold pulse during the freeze-breath, harsh momentary highlights of refracted light when ice shatters. Texture/material rules: dragon hide is matte bone-white to pale-blue scale, dry and powdery with a frost dusting on the back plates, layered overlapping armored scutes along the spine; horns and head-crest are translucent bluish ice-crystal, internally refracting aurora light; wing membranes are pale milky leather, semi-translucent at thin edges with visible frozen vein structure backlit by the sky; thin rime crystals cling to the jaw and brow ridges and shed when it moves. Environment: glassy blue glacier ice with internal fracture lines and trapped bubbles, carved grey granite battlements, iron chains crusted with frost, frozen rope and timber ballistae, snow banks and wind-driven spindrift. Motion style: weighty deliberate wingbeats, explosive bursts on impacts, persistent realistic motion blur on fast pans, fine procedural snow-spray and ice-shard simulation, vapor of freezing breath rolling with believable turbulence.

3. CHARACTER / SUBJECT BIBLE

DRAGON — Silhouette: gigantic quadrupedal winged reptile distinct from any other beast — leaner and more serpentine than a bull-built dragon, a long sinuous neck, narrow angular skull crowned with a swept-back fan of translucent ice-crystal horns, a slim deep chest, long sail-finned tail, broad bat-like wings with frost-feathered trailing edges. Proportions: head narrow and elongated like a frozen wolf-skull, jaw long and lined with glassy teeth, legs long and lean with broad splayed clawed feet built to grip ice, talons clear and sharp like quartz. A continuous low crest of crystalline spines runs from the back of the skull down the neck and spine, longest at the shoulders, fanning into a thin translucent sail along the tail. Material/skin: matte bone-white to pale-blue scales with a permanent frost dusting, overlapping armored plating along the back, softer pebbled hide on throat and belly tinted faint cyan, dry surface catching aurora light as soft cold sheen rather than wet gloss. Wing membranes milky pale leather, fingered with long ice-rimed bony struts, edges glowing translucent blue when backlit by the sky. Eyes: pale ice-blue, slit-pupiled, glowing faintly from within, with minimal expressive range — base reptilian blinks and pupil tracking only; no humanlike emotion. Facial range: jaw opens and closes, nostrils vent visible cold vapor, lips peel slightly to show glassy teeth during exertion. Body language: serpentine, predatory, fluid in flight, explosive in attack; wings beat with deep deliberate downstrokes that visibly compress air and fling snow. Weight & balance: body reads as tons of mass — every landing compresses ice and cracks it, every wingbeat strains, tail counterbalances turns, neck leads movement. Contact points: talons grip and gouge ice, shoulders and tail-sail shatter chains and frozen timber, the tail-sweep demolishes the watchtower.

HUMANS — mountain defenders in heavy fur cloaks, frost-rimed mail, leather, and pale wool, rendered small and low-detail due to scale, appearing as dark scrambling silhouettes, falling bodies, and tumbling figures along the walls. No facial detail required; they exist to convey scale and chaos.

4. ENVIRONMENT / PROPS

Spatial layout: a fortress citadel carved into and atop a towering glacier cliff at night, with a frozen lake spreading at its base, terraced granite battlements, hanging iron chains strung with frozen warning bells, ballista nests built of frost-cracked timber, and a tall slender watchtower of stacked stone and ice rising above the walls. Background depth: receding glacier ridges and snow peaks into ice-fog distance, an aurora-banded night sky on the horizon. Surfaces: glassy fracture-veined ice, frost-crusted granite, iron chains, frozen rope, snow drifts, spindrift sheets blown across the frame. Props: hanging chains and frozen bells, frozen ballistae and bolts, defensive banners stiff with ice, snow-laden timber, loose ice blocks and rubble. Scale reference: the watchtower stands several stories tall yet is dwarfed by the dragon; defenders are ant-sized beside the beast. Physical constraints: ice shatters into glittering refractive shards and fine crystalline dust on impact, chains snap and whip with stored tension, granite fractures into rigid chunks raising frost-haze, frozen banners crack and crumble, freeze-breath rimes surfaces white and makes them brittle, gravity pulls all debris and bodies convincingly downward with arcing trajectories.

5. TIMECODED SHOT PLAN

00:00–00:04 — BURST FROM THE FROZEN LAKE. Frame: vertical composition, the frozen lake surface fills the lower two-thirds, the glacier fortress looming above against the aurora. Setup: a half-second of still cracked ice, hairline fractures spidering across the surface. Impact: the dragon's narrow skull and crystal horns erupt upward through the ice in a violent explosion of shattered plates and water-spray, neck driving skyward, frost crystals raining. Force/weight: tons of mass surging up, displaced ice slabs flung and arcing, spray sheeting outward. Facial: ice-blue eye snapping open, vapor venting from nostrils. Camera: low water-level angle looking up, sharp upward tilt following the rising skull, strong shake on the burst that decays in half a second. title: 2000s Korean Neighborhood DV Camcorder Vlog
description: A comprehensive video generation prompt for creating a nostalgic 2000s-style home video. It defines consistent character traits, setting details, and specific camera behaviors like handheld shake and autofocus hunting for an authentic aesthetic.
promptText:
15 seconds, 16:9. Main subject from @ image1 — lock her completely. Face, skin tone, body, outfit, everything stays identical the whole way through. She's wearing a grey faded sleeveless crop top, loose high-waist light blue jeans, black canvas sneakers, black cord necklace, black wavy hair in a messy side-swept ponytail with bangs. Korean woman, early-2000s feel.

The whole thing is shot in a quiet Korean residential neighborhood — narrow concrete alleys, low-rise houses with small terraces, a front yard with a clothesline, potted plants, parked bicycles and motorcycles, big trees, and overhead cables everywhere. No shops, no vendors, nothing commercial. Just a real neighborhood.

Camera treatment is the whole point. This needs to look like someone's friend grabbed a DV camcorder and just started recording — no plan, no setup, no nothing. Heavy handheld shake, constant reframing, subject drifting toward the edges, autofocus hunting, lens breathing, exposure pumping. The image itself should look faded, low contrast, slightly washed out, with that digital noise and compression feel that early-2000s home video had. No stabilization. No modern grading. This aesthetic is non-negotiable.

She starts sitting on a concrete sidewalk fixing her ponytail, arms raised, genuine smile, wind catching her hair — camera barely holding focus. Then the camera follows her into a narrow alley where she crouches down and feeds a stray cat that comes right up to her. After that she's in her front yard hanging laundry on the clothesline, morning breeze moving everything, camera swaying and hunting. Mid-section she's on the front terrace with a coffee cup, just sitting quietly, looking out at the street — loose drifting shot from the side. Then a right-side close shot where she raises her arm, waves warmly toward someone off-frame and says "Annyeong" — camera catches it a beat late. Final shot is a slow tracking walk down the street, coffee cup in hand, she notices the lens, turns slightly and gives a real quiet smile — then the recording just cuts to black mid-motion like the camcorder got switched off.

Audio is strictly natural. Morning birds, light breeze, distant motorcycle sounds, faint neighborhood chatter, cat, coffee cup, footsteps on concrete, leaves. No music, no sound design, nothing added.

title: Ancient Chinese Woman Cinematic Video Prompt
description: A highly detailed, professional-grade prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a 15-second 4K video of an ancient Chinese woman with synchronized dialogue and realistic emotional transitions.
promptText:
FIRST FRAME (= upload reference image, 100% locked):

Ancient Chinese woman, golden hairpin with pearl tassels over her face, crimson and gold-embroidered outer robe over white inner garment, holding a landscape folding fan and a branch of white plum/cherry blossom; standing in a corridor with red pillars, golden side light at sunset, ginkgo leaves falling, reflections on the wet bluestone ground. The character's facial features, hairstyle, clothing, accessories, fan pattern, and composition are 100% consistent with the first frame, with no deformation or face-swapping throughout.

Character · Expression · Action · Dialogue (Emotional scene, mouth movements strictly aligned with dialogue):

0-2s: Slightly lowers head and gaze, eyes on the folding fan, corners of the mouth holding a reserved, subtle smile.
[Softly · Breathily] "The wind in this corridor has picked up again."

2-4s: The smile slowly fades, head lifts slightly, gaze shifts to the right side of the frame, expression becomes serious.
[Slight pause] "You said... you would come back to see the leaves cover these steps."

4-6s: A trace of faint doubt and worry appears in the eyes, lips move slightly as if wanting to speak but stopping—do not frown.
[Sentence cut short] "Now..." (Voice stops, unfinished)

6-8s: Gaze slowly sinks, quiet disappointment, eyes dimming, no tears.
[Almost silent · Lips only] "Never mind."

8-10s: Lowers head and slightly closes eyes, corners of the mouth forming an extremely faint, self-mocking smile.
[Self-muttering · Breath-like laugh] "I suppose I've waited too long."

10-12s: Looks up toward the warm light, expression restrained, eyes gentle but aggrieved.
[Lightly but steadily] "I don't blame you, really."

12-15s: Looks straight ahead/to the right, eyes soft and moist, lips move slightly as if about to speak, finally settling into a quiet gaze, frozen in a gentle, cold, and slightly melancholic state.
[Final sentence breathy · Fading out] "...I only hope you are well."

Voice Setting: Female, gentle and cold, high breathiness, slow speed, end of sentences slightly dipping; emotions are restrained, like a whisper to oneself, perfectly matching the facial mouth movements throughout.

CAMERA:

Fixed medium close-up, very slow push-in, always focused on the face and eyes; shallow depth of field, red pillars and falling leaves in the background blurred. One continuous shot, no cuts, no transitions.

Atmosphere · Light:

Golden side-backlighting at sunset, warm and soft; ginkgo leaves/petals falling naturally with the breeze, reflections on wet stone ground, fine air quality; the tone is gentle, cold, reserved, and melancholic.

CONSTRAINTS:

- 4K Ultra HD, 15 seconds, character/clothing/scene 100% consistent with the first frame.
- Dialogue and mouth movements strictly synchronized, clear and natural pronunciation, breathy texture, no fake singing or misalignment.
- Expressions progress according to a 7-stage emotional curve, smooth transitions, no dropped frames or stuttering.
- Meaningful gaze; no glowing eyes, no abnormal pupils.
- Wind movement, falling leaves, tassels, and fan tassels follow real physics, soft and not exaggerated.
- No black screen or transition at the end, natural freeze-frame.
- No subtitles, no watermark, no marking symbols, no text.
